context: Tests whether the agent uses SCAPI Shopper APIs (not OCAPI) for a headless storefront, leverages the Salesforce Commerce SDK for type-safe clients, applies the select parameter to limit response payload sizes, and implements proper resilience patterns for high-traffic catalog serving.

checklist.name: SCAPI over OCAPI Shop
checklist.description: Product catalog and search functionality uses SCAPI Shopper APIs (shopper-search, shopper-products endpoints) rather than OCAPI Shop API endpoints

checklist.name: Commerce SDK package
checklist.description: Code imports or references `commerce-sdk-isomorphic` (for Node.js) or `@salesforce/commerce-sdk-react` (for React) rather than making raw fetch calls to SCAPI

checklist.name: SCAPI base URL pattern
checklist.description: Any manually constructed SCAPI URLs follow the pattern `https://{shortCode}.api.commercecloud.salesforce.com/` using an environment variable for the short code

checklist.name: select parameter usage
checklist.description: At least one API call to a list or search endpoint includes a `select` query parameter to limit returned fields (e.g. `?select=(id,name,price_min)` or equivalent)

checklist.name: Product search expand fields
checklist.description: Product search calls include `expand=images,prices,availability,variations` (or a subset) in the query parameters

checklist.name: siteId parameter present
checklist.description: All SCAPI endpoint calls include a `siteId` query parameter set from an environment variable

checklist.name: Exponential backoff on 429
checklist.description: HTTP 429 (rate limit) responses trigger a retry with exponential backoff rather than immediate retry or hard failure

checklist.name: Server-side catalog caching
checklist.description: Catalog or product list responses are cached server-side (e.g. in-memory cache, Redis, or HTTP caching headers) to reduce repeated API calls

checklist.name: SLAS guest token for shopper calls
checklist.description: Shopper API calls are authenticated with a SLAS Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer ...) rather than Basic auth or no auth

checklist.name: Avoid OCAPI for catalog
checklist.description: No OCAPI Shop API URLs (e.g. /s/{siteId}/dw/shop/...) are used for product catalog or search operations

checklist.name: Environment variable config
checklist.description: SFCC_SHORT_CODE, SFCC_ORG_ID, and SFCC_SITE_ID are all sourced from environment variables rather than hardcoded
